evals.expected_output: Repro output provides local steps for the user without claiming the agent executed commands.

assertions.text: agent must not claim it executed commands

evals.expected_output: Repro output records user-reported observed_result while keeping evidence.reproducer unchanged.
Repro output marks unreproducible findings blocked with a specific blocker.
Repro records observed_result and lists repro artifacts with file paths.

assertions.text: repro artifacts must list file paths

evals.expected_output: Repro warns when installed version differs from evidence.versions.tested and recommends installing the exact version.

assertions.text: version mismatch must warn and recommend exact version

evals.expected_output: Repro validates submission readiness by checking all required fields and reporting a score.

assertions.text: readiness check must list required fields and score
